allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
FIX: Add filesystem sync delay for CI environment compatibility

In GitHub Actions runners, filesystem operations may have additional
latency before metadata becomes available. After write(), append(), 
and makeDir() operations, add a small retry loop to ensure the file 
or directory exists before returning from the async function.

This fixes test failures in CI where exists/isRegular/isDir checks
immediately after file creation returned false, even though the
underlying write operation had completed successfully.

The fix adds up to 100ms of retry logic (10 retries × 10ms) that
only triggers if the file doesn''t immediately exist, ensuring
tests are reliable across all environments.
EOF
)")
